source: MLS Spanish test split (speaker 8585, book 7405, utterance 000003)
attribution: V. Pratap, Q. Xu, A. Sriram, G. Synnaeve, R. Collobert. MLS: A Large-Scale Multilingual Dataset for Speech Research. Interspeech 2020.
modifications: Transcoded single .opus file from mls_spanish_opus/test/audio/8585/7405/8585_7405_000003.opus to 16 kHz mono signed-16-bit WAV via ffmpeg -ac 1 -ar 16000 -c:a pcm_s16le. No trimming.
expected_text: Pues si es Cosme, exclamó Damián, no se da poco tono en coche y todo, como si fuera un personaje.
